title: [v4.6] [CI:BUILD] RPM: separate out gvproxy for copr and rawhide
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #19333

/assign lsm5

```release-note

```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5*, *openshift-cherrypick-robot* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.6/OWNERS)~~ [lsm5] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Why does this need to be cherry-picked?

gvproxy will be a separate package on f38 as well. v4.6.1 will be cut from this branch which means packit Fedora tasks will depend on this branch. The `rawhide` in the commit message isn't quite true anymore.
err cherrypicking won't really work. I'll need to handle f38 as well.
